name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-2
title: B/B bug work: impl-suggestion must include test-gap analysis and test enhancement suggestion alongside code fix
description:
When the Work Protocol invokes rabbit-feature-touch in B/B mode for a bug, rabbit-spec currently produces an impl-suggestion focused on how to fix the code. It does not address why the existing tests failed to catch the bug in the first place.

Required additions to the impl-suggestion for B/B bug mode:
1. Test-gap analysis: explain which test coverage was absent, insufficient, or mis-scoped that allowed this bug to exist undetected.
2. Test enhancement suggestion: concrete recommendation for what new or modified tests would prevent regression — not just a fix-verification test, but coverage that closes the structural gap.

This ensures the TDD subagent writes tests that improve the suite holistically, not just tests that mechanically verify the specific fix. Without this, the same class of bug can recur via a different code path.

Scope: rabbit-spec impl-suggestion schema needs two new fields (test_gap_analysis, test_enhancement_suggestion) for bug-type items. The Work Protocol in rabbit-file SKILL.md and the rabbit-spec skill should condition on item type=bug to populate these fields.
